title: qrafty's End Villages
description: The end biome is too empty, so this pack adds end relicts from another time/dimension 🌔
body:
# More structures in the end. 🫐
The end biome is too empty, so this pack adds end relics from another time/dimension with loot tables! 🌔

![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b738d994607526a18bb611eda5f4f7e97eb93f55_0.webp)

**Including:** 20+ custom buildt structures generating random with each other. 

![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a250108b13f3501a4d957024dd1abe6d2312a7c.png)
## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)

### You want to support me? Consider leaving a tip at my [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/qrafty) 😊

**This pack is part of my main datapack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)!**


**Highly recommended addon from me:** [qrafty's Moony Endstone Texturepack!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-moony-endstone)
![MOONY ENDSTONE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec8b3577e9f4a8708ce10ac14b3f1bc570692f9b_0.webp)
